summary: Unified the lectic extraSpecialArgs resolution across both home-manager paths: lib/mkHost.nix and flake.nix's hmExtraSpecialArgs (previously raw flake-input lectic, consumed by nandi/hamsa/garuda/iso) now resolve to the built lectic-0.0.0 package via the pre-existing lectic.packages.${system}.lectic or ... or lectic expression, matching the standalone path. Removed the now-redundant standalone override and corrected docs/dual-home-manager.md's inaccurate 'intentional divergence' framing. Verified via nix eval (all paths now show lectic-0.0.0, zero NO-NAME entries), nix flake check (green), and successful builds of nandi's toplevel and the standalone home activation package. Committed as 5e104d3.

artifacts.summary: Resolved lectic to the built package in home-manager.extraSpecialArgs (was raw flake input)
Resolved lectic in hmExtraSpecialArgs (fixes iso config too); removed now-redundant standalone lectic override
Corrected the 'intentional divergence, not a bug' paragraph to describe the now-unified lectic resolution
All 4 phases marked COMPLETED with deviation annotations
Implementation summary with baseline/post-fix verification evidence

completion_data.completion_summary: Unified lectic specialArgs resolution across NixOS-integrated (lib/mkHost.nix, flake.nix iso config) and standalone home-manager paths so both ship the built lectic-0.0.0 package instead of the raw flake input; corrected docs/dual-home-manager.md accordingly. Verified via nix eval, nix flake check, and representative builds; committed as 5e104d3.

next_steps: Task 87 will extract flake.nix's iso block next; flake.nix is left in a clean committed state for that work. No further action needed for task 69's own scope.
